sentences.arabic: تَجَوَّلْتُ فِي السُّوقِ الْكَبِيرِ لِشِرَاءِ بَعْضِ الْهَدَايَا.
sentences.translation: Prošetao sam velikom pijacom kako bih kupio neke poklone.
sentences.translationEn: I wandered through the large market to buy some gifts.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدْتُ مَصْنُوعَاتٍ يَدَوِيَّةً رَائِعَةً وَمَلَابِسَ تَقْلِيدِيَّةً.
sentences.translation: Pronašao sam divne ručne radove i tradicionalnu odjeću.
sentences.translationEn: I found wonderful handicrafts and traditional clothes.

sentences.arabic: تَحَدَّثْتُ مَعَ الْبَائِعِ عَنْ أَسْعَارِ التُّحَفِ الصَّغِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Razgovarao sam sa prodavcem o cijenama malih suvenira.
sentences.translationEn: I spoke with the seller about the prices of small souvenirs.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَيْتُ هَدِيَّةً لِعَائِلَتِي وَلِأَصْدِقَائِي فِي الْوَطَنِ.
sentences.translation: Kupio sam poklon za svoju porodicu i prijatelje u domovini.
sentences.translationEn: I bought a gift for my family and my friends back home.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّاسُ فِي السُّوقِ لُطَفَاءَ وَوَدُودِينَ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Ljudi na pijaci su bili veoma ljubazni i srdačni.
sentences.translationEn: The people in the market were very kind and friendly.
